plain.en: God of power and mercy, who called your Martyr, Blessed Isidoro, to be a disciple of Christ, your Son, and made him a fearless and courageous witness of the Christian faith; grant that we, who celebrate the day of his triumph, may be strengthened in our call to be true witnessess of the Gospel. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: who called your Martyr, Blessed Isidoro,
to be a disciple of Christ, your Son,
and made him a fearless and courageous witness of the Christian faith;
grant that we, who celebrate the day of his triumph,
may be strengthened in our call to be true witnessess of the Gospel.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
